examples: This gyroscopic motion is called precession.
The control flow of decreasing gyroscopic coupling is presented.
It's powered by electricity using wheelchair motors and gyroscopic technology to make it move.
It consists of 359 movement components, including 167 parts for the Gyroscopic gravity control module.
You can also add an optional 2.4GHz gyroscopic remote control and a PrimeSense motion sensor just for giggles.
